commit_scope: Move the Form-native summary lane from synthetic source-id rows toward real source receipts by reading a checked-in .form file through kernel-native file primitives, validating exact citation byte slices, and binding the result to a summary CHOICE-RECEIPT.

commands: coord claim "real source summary receipt floor"

cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/nearest-shape.fk form-stdlib/classifier-eval.fk form-stdlib/choice-receipt.fk form-stdlib/branch-choice-order.fk form-stdlib/choice-receipt-learning.fk form-stdlib/oracle-catalog.fk form-stdlib/text-summary-learning.fk form-stdlib/tests/text-summary-real-source-band.fk

cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/nearest-shape.fk form-stdlib/classifier-eval.fk form-stdlib/choice-receipt.fk form-stdlib/branch-choice-order.fk form-stdlib/choice-receipt-learning.fk form-stdlib/oracle-catalog.fk form-stdlib/text-summary-learning.fk form-stdlib/tests/text-summary-learning-band.fk

cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/nearest-shape.fk form-stdlib/classifier-eval.fk form-stdlib/choice-receipt.fk form-stdlib/branch-choice-order.fk form-stdlib/choice-receipt-learning.fk form-stdlib/oracle-catalog.fk form-stdlib/text-summary-learning.fk form-stdlib/tool-channel.fk form-stdlib/code-tool-learning.fk form-stdlib/llm-feature-channel-floor.fk form-stdlib/tests/llm-feature-channel-floor-band.fk
local_validation.notes: Prompt guide passed on branch codex/real-summary-receipt-floor-20260614 and wellness reported no required repair. The new real-source band returned verdict 8191 on Go/Rust/TypeScript host-I/O kernels after repairing the read path from repo-root relative to form-working-directory relative. The existing summary learning band still returned 262143 and validate.sh printed fourth arm: 1 band(s) four-way (fkwu + pre-flattened tables), proving the host-I/O helper did not disturb the pure four-way summary lane. The dependent llm-feature-channel-floor band still returned 131071 with fourth arm: 1 band(s) four-way.

ci_validation.notes: Not pushed yet; CI not run at evidence creation time.

deploy_validation.summary: Local Form proof and docs only. No public deploy was performed at evidence creation time.

phase_gate.gate: A summary receipt must prove actual source bytes before learning from source claims.
phase_gate.next: Broaden the source-reader from one checked-in .form file to multiple file, store, route, and stream sources with dynamic source coordinates and retained receipts.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Form now has a native source-read summary floor: a cell can plan text:summarize-file through host:file, read a real checked-in .form file via kernel-native file primitives, validate exact byte slices as citations, gate the summary, and turn the result into a CHOICE-RECEIPT training sample.
test_flows: text:summarize-file returns an explicit host:file plan with cap.host.file.read and read_file+read_file_slice as the carrier.
The real-source proof reads docs/coherence-substrate/text-summary-learning.form through kernel-native file primitives from the form working directory.
Four citation rows match exact read_file_slice byte spans before the summary receipt is accepted.
The real-source summary passes existing summary quality gates and records citation count, token cost, source path, metadata, and receipt trace.
The existing four-way text-summary-learning proof and dependent LLM feature floor remain unchanged in behavior.
e2e_validation.summary: This is a real local file-data floor, not a shell, Python, or LLM carrier. It is intentionally 3-kernel host-I/O proof until the fourth arm admits read_file/read_file_slice.
